goal: Normalize all pose data into a single canonical format based on OpenPose JSON keypoints

core_principles.rule: Keypoints are the single source of truth. All visual representations must be derived from them, never the reverse.

notes: Each keypoint is stored as (x, y, confidence)
Arrays must have consistent length across dataset

input_data_types.bone_structure_full: can be converted to keypoints via color clustering
input_data_types.depth: conditioning only, not for pose extraction

rules: Never re-estimate keypoints if structured data already exists
Only use OpenPose detection as fallback
Avoid lossy reconstruction from rendered images if possible

topology.recommendation: use BODY_25 for consistency and completeness
topology.rule: Do not mix different skeleton topologies without explicit mapping

validation_rules: all poses must have identical keypoint ordering
missing keypoints must be set to (0,0,0)

comfyui_integration.note: ComfyUI can directly consume OpenPose JSON as structured pose input

anti_patterns: using skeleton images as primary data source
re-running pose detection on already structured data
mixing COCO and BODY_25 without mapping

final_decision.reason: structured, deterministic, reusable, compatible with ComfyUI and ControlNet
